name: Light Jet-Vac
description: Light Jet-Vac provides battle support for his allies using the Light element. He was a Light element alter-ego of the Air Skylander Jet-Vac in the beta and 1.0 version of Skylanders: Ring of Heroes. Though he had the same stats as his regular counterpart, he had an extra skill for a more aggressive approach to healing.
biography: Light Jet-Vac was a Light element alter-ego of the Air Skylander Jet-Vac in the beta and 1.0 version of Skylanders: Ring of Heroes. Though he had the same stats as his regular counterpart, he had an extra skill for a more aggressive approach to healing. He was the only male Light elemental counterpart of a Skylander from another element. He provided battle support for his allies using the Light element and was known for a notorious laugh, which was distinct from his regular counterpart.
personality: Noble and brave, Light Jet-Vac is a dedicated Sky Baron who adheres to a strict sense of duty. While typically serious, this version is known for a notorious laugh when idling, showcasing a slightly more aggressive and confident persona compared to his Air counterpart. He blurs the line between support and offense with his vacuum technology.

story.content: Light Jet-Vac was a Light element alter-ego of the Air Skylander Jet-Vac in the beta and 1.0 version of Skylanders: Ring of Heroes. Though he had the same stats as his regular counterpart, he had an extra skill for a more aggressive approach to healing. He was the only male Light elemental counterpart of a Skylander from another element. He and Shadow Spitfire are the only Skylanders from the beta and 1.0 version of ROH absent in the revamp.

trivia: Because of his element change, Light Jet-Vac's belt symbol is changed as well.
While regular Jet-Vac had a generic sound effect when idling, Light Jet-Vac had a notorious laugh, which oddly isn't heard in other games or in the TV show.
Light Jet Vac was the only male Light elemental counterpart of a Skylander from another element.
He was also the only Light Skylander absent in the revamped version of Ring of Heroes.
He and Shadow Spitfire are the only Skylanders from the beta and 1.0 version of ROH absent in the revamp.
gameplay: Light Jet-Vac provides battle support for his allies using the Light element. He features a mix of defensive shielding with his Vac Blaster and powerful team healing with Shoot the Breeze!, allowing for a more aggressive support role. His passive gear allows him to recover HP and restore endurance to allies after taking hits.

basic.name: Vac Blaster (Active)
basic.content: [1 enemy] Blasts a gust of air towards the enemy and gains a [SHIELD] for 2 turn(s).

basic_upgrades.name: Shoot the Breeze! (Active)
basic_upgrades.content: [All Allies] [Heals] all allies in proportion to his max HP. Grants [Wide Range DMG DOWN] on all allies for 1 turn (s).

soulgems.name: Eagle-Air Gear (Passive)
soulgems.content: [SELF] For every 5 attacks received, heals a small amount of HP and restocks [Endurance by 10] of the ally with the lowest Endurance. Further grants [Strength] for 2 turn(s).
